pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 features if the source/target level remains at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Framework to version 6.1.14 to support JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring 6.0.x does not support JDK 21; runtime errors or missing API support will occur without upgrading to 6.1+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Tomcat to version 11.0.0 to support JDK 21 and Jakarta EE 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Tomcat 10.1.x is based on Jakarta EE 10 and may not fully support JDK 21 features or required servlet specs; Tomcat 11 is required for full JDK 21/EE 11 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Jakarta Servlet API to 6.1.0 to match Tomcat 11 and JDK 21 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Servlet API 6.0.0 is for Jakarta EE 10; Tomcat 11 requires Servlet 6.1 (Jakarta EE 11). Mismatch causes compile/runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate testing framework from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter).
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 4 is deprecated and lacks native support for modern Java features; JUnit 5 is required for compatibility with modern build tools and Spring 6.1+ test support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 dependency with JUnit Jupiter (JUnit 5) in dependency management.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact ID changes from 'junit' to 'junit-jupiter'; keeping the old artifact breaks test compilation.
